topic.title: SAP TM Integration Monitoring & Error Handling

learningObjectives.title: Understand integration monitoring
learningObjectives.description: Explain how interface and message monitoring ensures reliable cross-system processing.

learningObjectives.title: Understand error categories
learningObjectives.description: Differentiate technical communication failures from business data errors.

learningObjectives.title: Understand issue resolution workflow
learningObjectives.description: Describe detection, root-cause correction, and safe message reprocessing steps.

sections.title: SAP TM Integration Monitoring & Error Handling

sections.content: Integration Monitoring ensures that business documents and messages exchanged between SAP TM and connected systems are processed successfully. SAP provides monitoring tools to detect failed interfaces, communication errors, missing master data and processing exceptions so that issues can be resolved quickly before transportation operations are affected.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: Integration Monitoring ensures that every business message sent between systems is delivered, processed and acknowledged successfully.

sections.title: Typical Integration Issues
rows: Location or Business Partner not synchronized

sections.content: An outbound delivery from SAP S/4HANA fails to create a Freight Unit in SAP TM because the shipping location has not been replicated. The monitoring dashboard identifies the failed message, the missing master data is synchronized and the interface message is reprocessed successfully.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Configure automatic alerts for failed interfaces and regularly monitor integration dashboards to detect issues before they impact transportation operations.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A global logistics company implemented automated integration monitoring with real-time alerts. Interface issues were detected within minutes, reducing business downtime and significantly improving transportation reliability.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Many SAP TM interview questions distinguish between technical integration errors (communication failures) and business errors (master data or document issues). Be able to explain both.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Reprocessing failed interface messages without correcting the underlying business or technical issue will simply cause the same error to occur again.

items: Integration Monitoring tracks message processing between systems.
Errors may be technical or business-related.
Monitoring dashboards help identify failed interfaces quickly.
Correct root causes before reprocessing failed messages.
Reliable integration ensures uninterrupted transportation operations.
